overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic action game featuring a samurai character in traditional Japanese attire walking through a serene temple courtyard. The character approaches and enters a wooden gate structure, transitioning from sunlit outdoor gardens to a dimly lit interior corridor with seated NPCs.

scene_state.functional_zone: traditional Japanese temple courtyard with stone pathways and raked gravel gardens

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the stone path toward the temple main gate, wearing traditional samurai attire with a sword at the hip

entered.detail: large traditional wooden gate structure with curved tile roof and open entrance
irregular stone tiles forming a walkway through the courtyard
raked gravel areas with moss and small shrubs flanking the path
mature deciduous tree with green foliage casting shadows on the ground
low wooden perimeter wall enclosing the temple grounds

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a serene temple courtyard with the camera following a samurai character walking along a stone pathway. The traditional wooden main gate stands ahead, framed by gravel gardens and mature trees casting morning shadows. The environment is peaceful and empty of other people.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden temple corridor with seated villagers and lattice windows

events.description: character passes through the temple gate doorway from outdoor courtyard to interior space
dramatic shift from bright sunlight to dim interior illuminated by light streaming through wooden lattice windows

agents.ego_description: passing through the temple gate and walking through the dark wooden corridor toward the exit on the far side

notable_agents.action: villagers sitting on the wooden floor in traditional seiza position against the left wall

entered.detail: thick wooden gate posts and open doors marking the entrance threshold
polished wooden planks of the temple interior floor
traditional wooden lattice windows casting striped shadow patterns on the floor
NPCs in white clothing sitting against the wall inside the temple
open doorway at the far end of the corridor leading to another courtyard

segments.scene_description: The character enters the dimly lit wooden temple interior, leaving the bright courtyard behind. Inside, villagers sit on the left side in traditional posture, while sunlight filters through lattice windows creating striped patterns on the polished floor. The camera moves through the corridor toward the open exit on the far side.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, open temple courtyard into the shadowed depths of a traditional wooden interior. It begins by trailing a samurai along a stone pathway, moving past gravel gardens and mature trees that cast long morning shadows across the peaceful grounds. As the character approaches and passes through the main wooden gate, the brilliant outdoor light recedes, shifting the atmosphere into a dimly lit corridor. The scene then expands to reveal villagers seated in traditional posture along the left wall, while sunlight filters through lattice windows to create striped patterns on the polished floor. The camera continues its forward momentum through the hall, finally heading toward the open exit on the far side.
